reviews.review_description:
When I first launched the app, it was AMAZING!!
Now when I use it, even after reinstalling the app, I am missing the two side panels that used to be there and now are gone?? Not sure if this was a dev decision to remove them, or something on my end... Any help would be greatly appreciated!

developer_response.body:
Hi!
Please contact our support team at support@deovr.com for assistance.

reviews.review_description: Doesnt work!!!

developer_response.body: Hello, the app is currently working properly. Please contact our support team, and we'll be happy to assist you: support@deovr.com

reviews.review_description: Hands down the best VR player I’ve used. It’s by far the most advanced, with the sharpest image quality compared to any other player, and truly a go-to for VR. Appreciate all the developers’ effort – Hyper is just on another level!

developer_response.body:
Hi Maxim,

Thank you so much for the amazing feedback! 
Our team puts a lot of effort into pushing VR playback forward, so it means a lot for us to hear that 🙏

reviews.review_description:
My personal experience is that it's the youtube app with a paywall. In fact most of the content behind a paywall is on youtube. So why do i use them well their old app had features and good resolution. 

Important missing fetures.

1. !NO zoom out or in with FOV adjustment. I watch 3D180 and adjust down to 3D150 for better image. And less spinning my neck around. Without this am not using the app!!!

2. Can't view the pages of content creator to see more of their content.

New things this app can do now to draw me in.

1. Video length filter. They boast about new content daily....30 sec and 3 min videos are not really ideal for VR content. I want to filter the spam videos like on youtube. I want 10-30mins. I have feeling they will avoid EVER!! Adding this looking at the spam girl content. 

2. A "Live performance" tab on the main page would be nice.

Other issues.

Yeah its fast but why do the video bitrate seem downgraded....for speed?

developer_response.body:
Hi MagnusEverlast,

We appreciate your detailed feedback and forwarded it to the team. 
More features are coming in the following updates! 
You can zoom in/out with grip + thumbstick. 

As for the bitrate, can you please be more specific about the issue? It definitely hasn't been downgraded. 
Please send the video links you're having issues with to support@deovr.com. We will check everything.

reviews.review_description: I am happy that I am a premium user because there are many interesting videos and entertainment.

developer_response.body:
Hi EdwardAmbrose,
Thank you for your feedback and support!
We appreciate it a lot 🙏

reviews.review_description: Good better the best!

developer_response.body:
Hi Xiltactic,
We really appreciate your support and hope you continue enjoying the app 🙌

reviews.review_description: No passthrough, no settings, bad controls... Not sure why it's released in this state especially when the other app works just fine - in fact, better. Don't read all the fake reviews.

developer_response.body:
Hi EdgyNarwhal2666,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. 

Please note that the passthrough feature is available in the application. Could you please clarify what prevented you from using passthrough? Please contact our support team support@deovr.com, we will be happy to help you.

The app is actively evolving, and features like improved passthrough, expanded settings, and control improvements are part of our ongoing development plans.

We hope future updates will change your impression.

reviews.review_description: I ve been uaing deovr(old version) as permenant membership. And I subscribed many channels , archivibg many videos in my playlist. Plz upgrade thoes features to this hyper version. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. 
We've redirected your feedback to the team. More features are coming in the future updates.

reviews.review_description: (edited) sorry for spreading misinformation early.. DeoVR subscribers CAN use HYPER Deo VR... thanks for response

developer_response.body:
Hi Marayacarried,
DeoVR and Hyper are free-to-use apps.
When you purchase a subscription, it's for the DeoVR streaming service to get access to premium videos.
Your subscription works in Hyper as well 🙌 
Please log in to your premium account in the app.

reviews.review_description: Really liking this player. It’s fast and easy to use. Everything loads quick and works exactly how it should.

Let us know if you ever have suggestions 🙌
